name: Okta, Inc.
business: We are the leading independent identity partner. Our Okta Platform and Auth0 Platform enable our customers to securely connect the right people to the right technologies and services at the right time. We employ a SaaS business model and generate revenue primarily by selling multi-year subscriptions to our cloud-based offerings.

exposures.sentence: Identity is becoming the most critical layer of an organization s security.
Okta for AI Agents, currently available in early access, provides governance and visibility for AI agents through the Okta Platform.
